canonical_title: A Logical Calculus of the Ideas Immanent in Nervous Activity

editorial.significance: First mathematical model of the neuron; the conceptual origin of neural networks.

canonical_title: As We May Think

editorial.significance: The memex vision; founding document of augmenting human intellect with machines.

canonical_title: A Mathematical Theory of Communication

editorial.significance: Created information theory; the quantitative substrate of all machine learning.

canonical_title: Computing Machinery and Intelligence

editorial.significance: Posed 'can machines think', proposed the imitation game; the field's founding question.

canonical_title: A Proposal for the Dartmouth Summer Research Project on Artificial Intelligence

editorial.authors: John McCarthy, Marvin Minsky, Nathaniel Rochester, Claude Shannon
editorial.significance: Coined 'artificial intelligence' and framed the research programme.

canonical_title: The Perceptron: A Probabilistic Model for Information Storage and Organization in the Brain

editorial.significance: First trainable neural classifier; launched learning machines and their first hype cycle.

canonical_title: Some Studies in Machine Learning Using the Game of Checkers

editorial.significance: Coined 'machine learning'; first self-improving game program.

canonical_title: Programs with Common Sense

editorial.significance: The Advice Taker; founding statement of logic-based AI and knowledge representation.

canonical_title: Man-Computer Symbiosis

editorial.significance: The augmentation-versus-automation agenda that still structures AI debates.

canonical_title: Steps Toward Artificial Intelligence

editorial.significance: Early synthesis of search, learning, and planning as the components of AI.

canonical_title: GPS: A Program That Simulates Human Thought

editorial.significance: General Problem Solver; means-ends analysis and the symbolic cognition paradigm.

canonical_title: Fuzzy Sets

editorial.significance: Founded fuzzy logic; a major non-probabilistic approach to reasoning under vagueness.

canonical_title: ELIZA: A Computer Program for the Study of Natural Language Communication

editorial.significance: First chatbot; revealed the human tendency to project understanding onto machines.

canonical_title: Some Philosophical Problems from the Standpoint of Artificial Intelligence

editorial.significance: Introduced the frame problem and situation calculus.

canonical_title: STRIPS: A New Approach to the Application of Theorem Proving to Problem Solving

editorial.authors: Richard E. Fikes, Nils J. Nilsson
editorial.significance: The planning formalism that dominated automated planning for decades.

canonical_title: Adaptation in Natural and Artificial Systems (foundational monograph)

editorial.significance: Genetic algorithms; evolution as a computational search paradigm.

canonical_title: Maximum Likelihood from Incomplete Data via the EM Algorithm

editorial.significance: The EM algorithm; workhorse of latent-variable estimation.

canonical_title: Minds, Brains, and Programs

editorial.significance: The Chinese Room argument; the canonical philosophical attack on strong AI.

canonical_title: Neocognitron: A Self-Organizing Neural Network Model

editorial.significance: The architectural ancestor of convolutional networks.

canonical_title: Neural Networks and Physical Systems with Emergent Collective Computational Abilities

editorial.significance: Hopfield networks; energy-based associative memory that revived the field (2024 Nobel).

canonical_title: Self-Organized Formation of Topologically Correct Feature Maps

editorial.significance: Self-organizing maps; unsupervised topology-preserving learning.

canonical_title: A Learning Algorithm for Boltzmann Machines

editorial.authors: David H. Ackley, Geoffrey E. Hinton, Terrence J. Sejnowski
editorial.significance: Stochastic networks and unsupervised learning of internal representations.

canonical_title: A Robust Layered Control System for a Mobile Robot

editorial.significance: Subsumption architecture; behaviour-based robotics against the symbolic mainstream.

canonical_title: Learning Representations by Back-Propagating Errors

editorial.authors: David E. Rumelhart, Geoffrey E. Hinton, Ronald J. Williams
editorial.significance: Made backpropagation the standard training algorithm; the engine of all deep learning.

canonical_title: Learning to Predict by the Methods of Temporal Differences

editorial.significance: TD learning; the core idea of modern RL.

canonical_title: Multilayer Feedforward Networks Are Universal Approximators

editorial.significance: Proved neural nets can approximate any function; the theoretical licence for the field.

editorial.significance: Made HMMs the standard sequential model for two decades of speech and NLP.

editorial.significance: Simple recurrent networks; sequence learning before LSTMs.

canonical_title: Intelligence Without Representation

editorial.significance: Manifesto for embodied intelligence; the strongest internal critique of GOFAI.

canonical_title: Q-Learning

editorial.significance: Model-free value learning with convergence proof.

canonical_title: Simple Statistical Gradient-Following Algorithms for Connectionist Reinforcement Learning

canonical_title: Causal Diagrams for Empirical Research

editorial.significance: The do-calculus; the formal foundation of modern causal inference.

canonical_title: Support-Vector Networks

editorial.significance: SVMs; the dominant classifier of the pre-deep-learning era.

canonical_title: Temporal Difference Learning and TD-Gammon

editorial.significance: Self-play RL reaches expert backgammon; the proof of concept for everything later.

canonical_title: Regression Shrinkage and Selection via the Lasso

editorial.significance: L1 regularization; sparse models across statistics and ML.

editorial.significance: Link-based ranking; the algorithm that organized the web's information.

editorial.significance: The most-used classical ML algorithm in applied practice.
